#+TITLE: ASP Skill Contract

* ASP skill contract v1
:PROPERTIES:
:CONTRACT_ID: asp.skill.v1
:CONTRACT_SCOPE: document
:CONTRACT_KIND: org-elements
:END:

** Contract binding keyword
:PROPERTIES:
:ASSERT_ID: asp.skill.contract.binding
:SEVERITY: error
:END:

#+BEGIN_SRC org-contract
assert count keyword where
  property(:key) = "CONTRACT_ORG"
>= 1
#+END_SRC

** Contract metadata section
:PROPERTIES:
:ASSERT_ID: asp.skill.section.contract-metadata
:SEVERITY: error
:END:

#+BEGIN_SRC org-contract
assert count headline where
  property(:raw-value) = "Contract Metadata"
>= 1
#+END_SRC

** Runtime activation section
:PROPERTIES:
:ASSERT_ID: asp.skill.section.runtime-activation
:SEVERITY: error
:END:

#+BEGIN_SRC org-contract
assert count headline where
  property(:raw-value) = "Runtime Activation"
>= 1
#+END_SRC

** Runtime activation table
:PROPERTIES:
:ASSERT_ID: asp.skill.runtime-activation.table
:SEVERITY: error
:END:

#+BEGIN_SRC org-contract
let runtime_activation = headline where property(:raw-value) = "Runtime Activation"

assert count table where
  descendant_of(runtime_activation)
>= 1
#+END_SRC

** Agent operating contract section
:PROPERTIES:
:ASSERT_ID: asp.skill.section.agent-operating-contract
:SEVERITY: error
:END:

#+BEGIN_SRC org-contract
assert count headline where
  property(:raw-value) = "Agent Operating Contract"
>= 1
#+END_SRC

** Agent search contract sections
:PROPERTIES:
:ASSERT_ID: asp.skill.agent-operating.required-sections
:SEVERITY: error
:END:

#+BEGIN_SRC org-contract
assert count headline where
  property(:raw-value) = "ASP Explorer Subagent" or property(:raw-value) = "Search Before Source" or property(:raw-value) = "Hook Recovery" or property(:raw-value) = "Command Selection" or property(:raw-value) = "Failure Frontier" or property(:raw-value) = "Document Query" or property(:raw-value) = "General Rules"
>= 7
#+END_SRC

** Gerbil POO extension search contract
:PROPERTIES:
:ASSERT_ID: asp.skill.agent-operating.gerbil-poo-extension-search
:SEVERITY: error
:END:

#+BEGIN_SRC org-contract
assert count headline where
  property(:raw-value) = "Gerbil POO Extension Search"
  and property(:REGISTERED_KNOWLEDGE) = "gerbil-poo://registry"
  and property(:SELECTOR_SCHEME) = "gerbil-poo-logical-symbol"
  and property(:NOT_PROJECT_ACTIVATION) = "true"
  and property(:ACTIVATION_SOURCE) = "gerbil.pkg"
  and property(:DEPENDENCY_MODE) = "required"
>= 1
#+END_SRC

** Provider contracts section
:PROPERTIES:
:ASSERT_ID: asp.skill.section.provider-contracts
:SEVERITY: error
:END:

#+BEGIN_SRC org-contract
assert count headline where
  property(:raw-value) = "Provider Contracts"
>= 1
#+END_SRC

** Provider contract entries
:PROPERTIES:
:ASSERT_ID: asp.skill.provider-contract.entries
:SEVERITY: error
:END:

#+BEGIN_SRC org-contract
let provider_contracts = headline where property(:raw-value) = "Provider Contracts"

assert count headline where
  child_of(provider_contracts)
>= 1
#+END_SRC

** Client surface section
:PROPERTIES:
:ASSERT_ID: asp.skill.section.client-surface
:SEVERITY: error
:END:

#+BEGIN_SRC org-contract
assert count headline where
  property(:raw-value) = "Client Surface"
>= 1
#+END_SRC
